genre_refs: rogues-gallery / 'most wanted' grid; magazine masthead styling
description: Graphic on a solid black background titled 'Worst of the Week.' The title is in large white serif display type with 'Worst' largest and 'of the' inside a small red parallelogram banner. Arranged in a grid around the central title are twelve booking-style photographs of men of varied ages, each in a small rounded-rectangle frame with a dark caption bar beneath. The captions read: 'Child Molestation', 'Smuggling Aliens', 'Child Rape', 'Firearm Possession', 'Child Sexual Conduct', 'Manslaughter', 'Fondling a Child', 'Manslaughter', 'Child Molestation', 'Assault and Battery', 'Human Smuggling', 'Cocaine Distribution'. One image at lower right is a blurred, low-resolution grayscale face. The bottom left has a red banner with white text 'ice.gov/WoW'; the bottom right shows the gray DHS seal and the 'ICE' wordmark.
notable_text: Worst of the Week; Child Molestation; Smuggling Aliens; Child Rape; Firearm Possession; Manslaughter; Human Smuggling; Cocaine Distribution; ice.gov/WoW
